covers.api: pycalphad.Database(tdb) (io/database.py; io/tdb.py TDB format hook); dbf.phases / dbf.elements / dbf.symbols
pycalphad.equilibrium(...).MU (variables.py:830-836, v.MU), J/mol, one per component
pycalphad.equilibrium/calculate(..., output='HM').HM, J/mol per mole of atoms
pycalphad.equilibrium(dbf, comps, phases, conds).GM, J/mol per mole of atoms; also calculate(..., output='GM')
pycalphad.equilibrium(...).NP (variables.py:488-505, v.NP), fraction, per stable phase; paired with eq.Phase
pycalphad.binplot(dbf, comps, phases, conds) boundary loci (compat_api.py:6-42), K; drawn, not returned as scalars
